visual.name: nexoraKPI
visual.description: Nexora KPI — a premium KPI card with Arabic-first RTL design. 7 preset styles, auto-fit responsive value, flip card with back details, sparkline, target & delta indicators, percent/currency formats including the official Saudi Riyal symbol (U+20C1), full font controls, and Arabic/English localization. Part of the Nexora Suite by Nexora Analysis.

dataRoles.name: value
dataRoles.description: Drag your main KPI measure here

dataRoles.name: comparison
dataRoles.description: Optional: Prior year, target, or budget for delta calculation

dataRoles.name: label
dataRoles.description: Optional: Use a column as the label

dataRoles.name: breakdown
dataRoles.description: Optional: A category (e.g. Status) to split the value into a legend

dataRoles.name: trend
dataRoles.description: Time series values for the inline sparkline (e.g. Date or Month)

dataRoles.name: target
dataRoles.description: Target value for the progress indicator
